issues.detail: The skill does not handle missing or malformed sections of the knowledge graph, such as absent layers or tour data.
The instructions lack concrete code snippets or command examples, making it harder for users to implement the steps directly.

scenarios.name: Generate onboarding guide from knowledge graph
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a generic onboarding doc with no awareness of .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json or the project/layers/tour/file-node extraction pattern; treatment grep-extracts each section and produces the six-section markdown the skill specifies.

scenarios.name: Identify complexity hotspots for new hires
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cannot know that complexity is encoded on file-level nodes in the knowledge graph or that >10 is the hotspot threshold; treatment filters type:'file' nodes and applies the documented complexity>10 rule.
